---
title: "INVERSE_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The inverse link :math:`g( mu) = 1 /  mu`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:INVERSE_LINK -->
```python
INVERSE_LINK = Link(name='inverse', link=(lambda mu: 1.0 / jnp.clip(mu, _EPS, None)), linkinv=(lambda eta: 1.0 / jnp.clip(eta, _EPS, None)), mu_eta=_inverse_mu_eta, eta_bound=(float('inf')))
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:INVERSE_LINK -->
The inverse link $g(\mu) = 1 / \mu$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
